content: agent1: implementing click.edit() multi-file support in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class, edit_file->edit_files) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function signature). Will update filename param to accept str | Iterable[str] | None.

agent1: done with my part. Renamed Editor.edit_file(filename) -> Editor.edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]) in _termui_impl.py (joins multiple quoted filenames for subprocess call). Editor.edit() now calls self.edit_files((name,)). In termui.py, edit() filename param is now str | Iterable[str] | None, with two @t.overload signatures added above the impl, and it calls ed.edit_files(filenames=(filename,) if isinstance(filename, str) else filename). If your process_priority work also touches edit_files/edit(), please build on top of these signatures (edit_files takes filenames iterable, not a single filename) rather than reintroducing edit_file singular method, to avoid us clobbering each other.
